rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDGAR FORREST CANON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Respondent Forrest Canon To Quash Deposition Subpoenas To Kaiser Hospital & Pmg/Sf Psych Dept Of Psychiatry And Request For Sanctions; Declaration Of Stephanie Barber Hess In Support Of
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Wednesday, September 23, 2009. Respondent Forrest Canon's Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas To Kaiser Hospital & PMG/San Francisco And To Kaiser Hospital & PMG/SF Psych Dept Of Psychiatry And Request For Sanctions. 1. Motion to quash deposition subpoenas to Kaiser Hospital & PMG/San Francisco and to Kaiser Hospital & PMG/SF Psych Dept Of Psychiatry and request for sanctions denied; Evidence Code §§1000 &1003 establish that the privilege does not exist with regard to the subject Will contest proceeding; 2. Notwithstanding the denial of respondent's motion, the court orders that the disclosure of any and all responsive information and documents produced in compliance with the subject subpoenas shall be limited to the parties, their counsel of record [and any employee to whom disclosure is necessary in the prosecution or defense of this action], and/or expert consulted or retained by counsel in connection with the subject claim. In the event that information is disclosed to any such employee, expert or consultant, those parties shall be informed of these restrictions, and provided with a copy of this order. 3. Contestant Schlenker's request for sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $540.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. = (610/PS)
